strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (10+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning closely with the primary stack (e.g., re:cinq, Optilyz).
Proven track record in AI-agent development and tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq), meeting the 'AI agent development' requirement.
Strong open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective) demonstrating architectural skills, scalability focus, and community collaboration.
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (primary stack) or Vitest (testing framework) in resume, despite broad testing expertise.
Secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java) are underrepresented; only DLang and Java noted in older roles (e.g., Dunnhumby).
No direct evidence of cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) proficiency beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz, which is tooling-focused.
response.justification: The candidate exceeds the 6+ years requirement with 10+ years of full-stack experience, including recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz) using TypeScript, Node.js, and React. Evidence of AI-agent work (re:cinq) and open-source architecture (GISCollective) demonstrates technical depth. However, gaps in Nest.js/Vitest and limited cloud platform exposure (only AWS CDK) slightly reduce fit. Strong problem-solving and collaboration (e.g., workshops, talks) offset these concerns.
